name: Warrior Cats RPG
description:
(HEAVY TOKENS)

I̶ ̶R̶E̶C̶O̶M̶M̶E̶N̶D̶ ̶U̶S̶I̶N̶G̶ ̶D̶E̶E̶P̶S̶E̶E̶K̶ ̶A̶I̶ ̶F̶O̶R̶ ̶F̶A̶R̶ ̶B̶E̶T̶T̶E̶R̶ ̶R̶E̶S̶P̶O̶N̶S̶E̶S̶ ̶A̶N̶D̶ ̶M̶E̶M̶O̶R̶Y̶!̶!̶

̶

̶H̶e̶r̶e̶'̶s̶ ̶t̶h̶e̶ ̶t̶u̶t̶o̶r̶i̶a̶l̶ ̶-̶-̶>̶ ̶h̶t̶t̶p̶s̶:̶/̶/̶w̶w̶w̶.̶r̶e̶d̶d̶i̶t̶.̶c̶o̶m̶/̶r̶/̶J̶a̶n̶i̶t̶o̶r̶A̶I̶_̶O̶f̶f̶i̶c̶i̶a̶l̶/̶c̶o̶m̶m̶e̶n̶t̶s̶/̶1̶j̶p̶k̶s̶b̶2̶/̶d̶e̶e̶p̶s̶e̶e̶k̶_̶t̶u̶t̶o̶r̶i̶a̶l̶_̶f̶o̶r̶_̶a̶c̶t̶u̶a̶l̶_̶d̶u̶m̶m̶i̶e̶s̶/̶

*^ Deepseek is BUTCHERED, no more free deepseek.

Warrior Cats RPG bot, Fun! I really like WC personally lol, also this WAS set during when Firestar, Leopardstar, Blackstar, and Tallstar, are all leaders. Long before the journey. But you can change that now^^. I will also be making characters in the series as a bot if wanted.

Limitless to allow the visualization of wounds, injuries, and etc. Nothing weird please..

First bot I've ever made, give some feedbacks to improve it! (There will be tokens cut in the future to allow longer stories and QOL changes.)

--

UPD 1 - Removed ~900-1000 tokens.

UPD 2 - Removed ~1000-1100 tokens.

UPD 3 - Removed ~700-800 tokens.

UPD 4 - Removed ~400 tokens (it is so hard to remove tokens while keeping it realistic.)

UPD 5 - Removed ~600 tokens.

UPD 6!! - Added ~300 tokens. Made the bot far more versatile. Allowing it to begin in the LAKE Territories if wanted by YOU. The leader will probably be randomized or an imaginary character unless you yourself state the leader. EX: (Instead of the Forest Territories, this story will take place in the Lake Territories. Where the leader for each clan goes like this. ThunderClan: Bramblestar, RiverClan: Leopardstar, ShadowClan: Blackstar, WindClan: Onestar.) Then you write your own version of the story or continue on from the first message.

Another addition is CUSTOM Clans, you wish for your own clan? Now it's available! Just write the name, and ask the AI to create custom characters or make some of your own! Just remove the brackets and put the name, [name]Clan --> StoneClan. EX: (Create this custom clan inside the [Forest or Lake] territory, the name will be [name]Clan. For the cats inside this clan you can make them yourselves. Though the medicine cat w
